---
title: "Mayela Fosado Mendoza"
image: "Mayela_Fosado_Mendoza.jpg"
links:
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "linkedin", fill = "#659287")` LinkedIn'
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/mayela-fosado-mendoza/"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "github", fill = "#659287")` Github'
    url: "https://github.com/Mayfm/"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "researchgate", fill = "#659287")` ResearchGate'
    url: "https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Mayela-Fosado-Mendoza"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "x-twitter", fill = "#659287")` Twitter'
    url: "https://twitter.com/May_fm0/"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "envelope", fill = "#659287")` maye.fosado@gmail.com'
    url: "mailto:maye.fosado@gmail.com"
 #- label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "user", fill = "steelblue")` CV'
  #  url: "https://eveliacoss.github.io/CV/cv_ECoss.html"
output:
  postcards::trestles
---

```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE} 
library(fontawesome)
```


## 🌸 Bio

Hi! I’m Mayela, a microbiologist exploring bioinformatics, data science, and computational biology. I am interested in applying computational approaches to understand biological systems and analyze complex biological data.

I completed my undergraduate thesis at the Instituto de Neurobiología (UNAM), where I performed a metagenomic analysis of the microbiota associated with the body wall of the terrestrial gastropod *Deroceras laeve*. Through this project, I developed experience in bioinformatics workflows, data analysis, and computational tools for biological research.

I am a member of **ISCB RSG-Mexico**, where I contribute to the organization of bioinformatics courses, workshops, symposia, journal clubs, and outreach activities. 

Currently, I continue expanding my skills in bioinformatics, computational biology, Python, and data science through research, training programs, and community-driven initiatives.

##  Education

**B.Sc. in Microbiology** | Universidad Autónoma de Querétaro (UAQ), Mexico

**Undergraduate Thesis** | Instituto de Neurobiología (INB), UNAM 

**Thesis title:** Análisis metagenómico de la microbiota en la pared corporal del gasterópodo *Deroceras laeve*.

##  Experience

**Research Intern** | Instituto de Neurobiología, UNAM

Research focused on metagenomics, microbiome analysis, and bioinformatics workflows.

**Council Member** | ISCB RSG-Mexico

Supporting educational initiatives, workshops, symposia, and outreach activities in bioinformatics.

##  Repository Contributions

### Thesis Project

- [Microbiota Thesis Pipeline](https://github.com/Mayfm/microbiota-thesis-pipeline)

Bioinformatics workflow developed for my undergraduate thesis, including Bash preprocessing, taxonomic classification, diversity analyses, statistical analyses in R, and data visualization.

### Collaborative Work

- [Workshop Repository](https://github.com/ISCB-RSG-MEXICO/Workshop_Bash2025)

Educational materials and exercises developed for bioinformatics training activities.

##  Technical Skills

- Metagenomics & microbiome analysis
- Bioinformatics: Kraken2, phyloseq, KEGG Mapper
- Data analysis in R
- Python for data analysis
- Bash
- Git & GitHub

##  Interests

Bioinformatics • Computational Biology • Data Science • Metagenomics • Microbiome Research

## Certificates

A collection of my certificates, training activities, and participation records is available on my GitHub profile [here](https://github.com/Mayfm/Mayfm/tree/main/Certificates).
